description: 赛博科技 - 深色底 + 霓虹青紫,未来科技感,适合黑客 / 赛博朋克 / 前沿科技报道

styles.body: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #d8e6f0; line-height: 1.85; letter-spacing: 0.4px; word-spacing: 1.5px; padding: 28px 36px; background: #0a0e1a;
styles.h1: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #00e5d0; text-align: left; margin: 34px 0 22px; padding: 0 0 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #00e5d0; letter-spacing: 2px; line-height: 1.4; text-transform: uppercase;
styles.h2: font-size: 16.5px; font-weight: 800; color: #00e5d0; margin: 40px 0 18px; padding: 8px 14px; background: rgba(0,229,208,0.08); border-left: 3px solid #00e5d0; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase;
styles.h3: font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #c085ff; margin: 28px 0 12px; padding: 0; letter-spacing: 1px;
styles.p: margin: 16px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #c8d4df; line-height: 1.9;
styles.blockquote: margin: 24px 0; padding: 16px 22px; background: rgba(192,133,255,0.06); border-left: 3px solid #c085ff; color: #d8caff; font-size: 14.5px; border-radius: 0; line-height: 1.85; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 2px; margin: 24px auto; display: block; border: 1px solid #00e5d0; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,229,208,0.15);
styles.code_inline: background: #12182a; color: #00e5d0; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; border: 1px solid #1e2a4a;
styles.code_block: background: #060912; color: #d8e6f0; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.65; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre; margin: 24px 0; border: 1px solid #1e2a4a; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; -moz-tab-size: 2; tab-size: 2; font-variant-ligatures: none; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
styles.ol: margin: 18px 0; padding-left: 0; list-style: none; counter-reset: list;
styles.li_bullet: color: #00e5d0; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; display: inline-block; min-width: 16px; margin-right: 8px; text-align: left;
styles.li_number: color: #00e5d0; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; min-width: 22px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; display: inline-block; margin-right: 10px;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #00e5d0, #c085ff, transparent); margin: 38px 0;
styles.a: color: #00e5d0; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,229,208,0.5);
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 24px 0; font-size: 13.5px; border: 1px solid #1e2a4a; table-layout: fixed; word-break: break-word;
styles.th: background: #12182a; color: #00e5d0; padding: 10px 12px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.5px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; border-bottom: 1px solid #00e5d0; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.5;
styles.td: padding: 10px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e2a4a; color: #c8d4df; font-size: 13px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.55;
styles.caption: font-size: 12px; color: #6a7a8a; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 1px;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #00e5d0; letter-spacing: 16px; font-size: 12px; margin: 38px 0; user-select: none; opacity: 0.6; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;

highlights.hl_yellow: background: rgba(255,215,80,0.18); color: #ffd750; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 2px; font-weight: 600;
highlights.hl_blue: background: rgba(0,229,208,0.15); color: #00e5d0; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 2px; font-weight: 600;
highlights.hl_pink: background: rgba(255,80,180,0.15); color: #ff5bbc; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 2px; font-weight: 600;
highlights.hl_green: background: rgba(80,255,150,0.15); color: #50ff96; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 2px; font-weight: 600;

list_style.label: A · 终端前缀
list_style.num_container: display: inline-block; color: #00e5d0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono','Menlo',monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.5px; margin-right: 10px;
list_style.bullet_container: display: inline-block; color: #00e5d0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono','Menlo',monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; margin-right: 10px;
